text: I feel a sense of anticipation standing outside this glass-walled room. The light is sterile and slightly bluish, bouncing off the white ceiling and polished floor. There’s a clarity and emptiness to the corridor, yet something intriguing draws me toward the interior exhibit—an invitation to step from ordinariness into a curated world just beyond the transparent barrier. I feel suspended between participation and spectatorship, aware of my own curiosity and the gentle hum of expectation.
